system.notes: Reactive (proactive) armor of small explosive cells that detonate outward to defeat incoming rounds. On each hit, roll 2d6 vs an Activation TN (1 on the first hit, +1 each subsequent hit) — on success, reduce the attack's damage code by a level (standard anti-vehicle reductions still apply). Military-grade. Parts cost 20,000¥ install / Body × 500¥ replacement; load −(Body × 50) kg/point; Avail 10/28 days; Base Time (Body × 40) hrs. Rigger 2 p.129.
